question: Which of these following is not the function of the transmission and transaxle?
options: Provide the torque needed to move the vehicle under a variety of road and load conditions.
Distribute the driving torque to the left and right wheels when the vehicle turns.
Be shifted into neutral for starting the engine and running it without turning the drive wheels.
Be shifted into reverse so the vehicle can move backward.
answer: Distribute the driving torque to the left and right wheels when the vehicle turns.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được.

options: Easy to shift and shifted gear can not jump out.
Ensure only one gear is shifted at a moment.

options: Can not shift into reverse gear when vehicle moving forward.

options: One gear (ratio) is made by a pair of gears.

question: Talking about the operation of transmission of FR vehicles, which of the following statements is incorrect?
options: The driven (output) shaft is connecting with the propeller shaft.
The teeth inside the synchronizer hub are splined with the output shaft.
Interlock mechanism in a device to prevent jump out of shifting gear.
Transmission case is normally made from cast steel or aluminum alloy.
answer: Interlock mechanism in a device to prevent jump out of shifting gear.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Trong ảnh có một đoạn chữ Việt bị lẫn sau option 2, mình đã bỏ để giữ câu tiếng Anh sạch.

question: Talking about three shafts transmission, which of following statements is incorrect?
options: The function of the synchronizer is to make the rotating gears with different speed to same speed and to lock them together.
Transmission case is normally made from cast steel or aluminum alloy.
Output shaft and propeller shaft are splined together and rotating at same speed.
The counter shaft always rotates even when the clutch is disengaged.
answer: The counter shaft always rotates even when the clutch is disengaged.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được.

question: Talking about movements of the shift lever, which of the followings is incorrect?
options: First movement is horizontal lever to select shift fork and synchronizer for the desired gear.
To shift the gear, the driver does horizontal lever firstly, and then does longitudinal lever.
Second movement is longitudinal lever to move the synchronizer sleeve.
First movement is horizontal lever to move the synchronizer sleeve.
answer: First movement is horizontal lever to move the synchronizer sleeve.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được.

question: Talking about the torque converter, which of the following is incorrect?
options: The torque converter need a two-way clutch for operation.
The torque converter need a lockup clutch mechanism inside.
The torque converter can increase the torque.
The torque converter is different from the fluid coupling because it has the stator.
answer: The torque converter need a two-way clutch for operation.

question: Find the incorrect statement in the followings?
options: A single planetary gear set has three main parts, these are a ring gear, a planetary carrier with planetary pinions, and a sun gear.
The planetary gearset can provide 5 conditions: speed increase (overdrive), speed decrease (reduction), direct drive (lockup), neutral, and reverse.
When fixing the ring gear (stationary), driving member is sun gear, driven member is planetary carrier, planetary gearset becomes overdrive mechanism with the same direction.
From two planetary gearsets, it is possible to combine them using common sun gear or common planetary carrier to have more many gear ratios.
answer: When fixing the ring gear (stationary), driving member is sun gear, driven member is planetary carrier, planetary gearset becomes overdrive mechanism with the same direction.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được.

question: Talking about the gear shifting schedule for automatic transmission, which of the followings is incorrect?
options: The curves on the gear shifting schedule start from origin of coordinate system.
On the gear shifting schedule, the horizontal axis the vehicle speed, and the vertical axis is the throttle opening.
The upshift curve and the downshift curve are two separate curve.
Gear shifting schedule has kick down area, that respond the need of acceleration.
answer: The curves on the gear shifting schedule start from origin of coordinate system.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được.
